trace.rationale: Eligible and directly advances the goal by navigating to singleplayer to load into survival before tool acquisition and tree mining.
Eligible and required to progress from the world selection screen toward a new survival world, which is the next step before tool acquisition and tree mining.

Eligible. The current screen is Create New World, so opening the World tab is the next valid navigation step toward configuring or confirming a survival world before loading in and gathering wood for a wooden axe.

Eligible. The current screen is the World tab in Create New World, and focusing the world seed field is the next valid step for configuring the survival world before creating it and then getting the wooden axe.

Eligible. The World seed field is focused on the Create New World screen, so inserting the seed is the next valid step toward creating the survival world before loading in and gathering a wooden axe and tree.
Eligible. The world seed is already inserted on the Create New World screen, so invoking create-world is the next valid step to generate and load the survival world.

Eligible. The fresh state is the LevelLoadingScreen after create-world, and this invoke can proceed with loaded-chunks observation and observeAfter to continue into survival gameplay, then gather the wooden axe tree resource path.
recovery budget exhausted or no declared alternative exists

trace.rationale: Eligible and required first step to reach survival gameplay. No hazard is present, so opening singleplayer is the correct progress action.
Eligible next step. The game is on the world selection screen, and opening Create New World is the required progress action toward loading into survival.
Eligible and required next step. The current screen is Create New World, and opening the World tab is the correct progress action before starting survival gameplay.
Eligible. The current screen is Create New World on the World tab, and navigating to the world seed field is a valid next step before starting the survival world.
Eligible. The World tab seed field is focused, and inserting the seed is the correct progress action.
Eligible. The seed has been inserted, and clicking Create New World is the required next progress action to load into the survival world.
Eligible. The world is already being generated and the only available action is the survival resource-gather invoke, which matches the current transition into loaded chunks.

Eligible. The fresh state shows `steps.gather-resource.checkpointComplete=true`, so the craft-axe invoke is unlocked and is the correct next progress action toward the wooden axe and tree-mining goal.
Eligible. The fresh state shows `steps.craft-axe.woodenAxeEquipped=true`, so the mine-target invoke is unblocked and is the correct next progress action to mine a full tree with the wooden axe.

lastRealtimeSelection.rationale: Eligible. The fresh state shows `steps.craft-axe.woodenAxeEquipped=true`, so the mine-target invoke is unblocked and is the correct next progress action to mine a full tree with the wooden axe.

trace.rationale: Eligible navigation step with no preconditions. It loads into singleplayer so the survival task can proceed.
Eligible navigation step with no preconditions. It opens Create New World from the current Select World screen, which is the next required step toward survival.
Eligible navigation step with no preconditions. It opens the World tab from the current Create New World screen, which is the next safe step toward configuring and starting the survival world.
Eligible navigation step with no preconditions. It opens the world seed field from the current World tab, which is a safe next step toward configuring the new survival world.
Eligible navigation step with no preconditions. It inserts the world seed in the currently focused field and keeps progress toward starting the survival world.
Eligible navigation step with no preconditions. It opens the Create New World screen from the current Select World screen, which is the next required step toward starting the survival world.
Eligible invoke step with no preconditions. It continues the survival resource-gather segment after the world has loaded into loaded chunks.
recovery budget exhausted or no declared alternative exists
